---
title: "Leaderboards"
---

Сводка по всем соревновательным ДЗ. Файл генерируется автоматически из `grader/state/leaderboards.json` командой `ml3 grade render-leaderboards`.

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
import json
from pathlib import Path

state = Path("grader/state/leaderboards.json")
if not state.exists():
    print("*Пока нет сабмитов.*")
else:
    data = json.loads(state.read_text())
    for hw_id, board in data.items():
        print(f"\n## {hw_id}\n")
        print(f"**Метрика:** `{board['metric']}` · **Цель:** {board['goal']}\n")
        print("| Rank | Student | Score | Submitted |")
        print("|---:|:---|---:|:---|")
        rows = sorted(
            board["submissions"],
            key=lambda r: r["score"],
            reverse=board["goal"] == "max",
        )
        for i, row in enumerate(rows, 1):
            print(f"| {i} | {row['student']} | {row['score']:.4f} | {row['ts']} |")
```
